ocr_findings.description: Section marker '◄ コーポレートガバナンス' uses a triangle/arrow glyph in OCR that differs from the original icon badge styling — cosmetic only

reviewer_notes: Lesson 08-06 内部統制 page with a 4-row table (コーポレートガバナンス / 内部統制 / ITガバナンス / IT統制) and intro paragraph plus start of コーポレートガバナンス section. Table cell content and body text are faithfully captured. Illustration present in image; OCR correctly uses image placeholder.
